query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Figment', 'A fabrication, fantasy, invention, something fictitious', 'The essay highlights the figment of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Fled', 'Ran away from danger or from something frightening', 'The essay highlights the fled of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Floral', 'Of, pertaining to, or connected with flowers', 'Scholars noted a striking floral between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Floridness', 'The quality of being florid', 'The essay highlights the floridness of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Florist', 'A person who sells flowers', 'The essay highlights the florist of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Flotsam', 'Debris floating in a sea, fragments from a shipwreck', 'Her flotsam became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Flourish', 'To thrive or grow well', 'The author hoped the new policy would flourish tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Flout', 'To openly disregard a rule or convention', 'The author hoped the new policy would flout tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fluctuate', 'To change or vary irregularly', '“Stock prices tend to fluctuate throughout the day.”', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fluctuation', 'A motion like that of waves, a moving back and forth', 'Her fluctuation became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Flue', 'A pipe or duct that carries gaseous combustion products away', 'Her flue became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
